rulings.Case Title: ONE RINCON HILL ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MOHSIN AHMMED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Objection Free Response From Pltf And X-Deft One Rincon Hill Association To X-Complainant'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Docs, Set One, And, Monetary Sanctions Against Association And Its Atty Of Record; Memo Of P&A In Support Of
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 28, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT MOHSIN AHMMED's Motion To Compel Objection Free Response From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant One Rincon Hill Association To Cross-Complainant'S Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents, Set One, And, Monetary Sanctions Against Association And Its Atty Of Record; Memo Of P&A In Support Of DENIED. It is undisputed that Ahmmed has received responses to his document demand. Any delay was occasioned by ambiguity in Ahmmed's proof of service. No sanctions. Had failure to timely respond been proved, the Court would have entertained a motion under CCP 2031.300(a) in any event. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SANTIAGO M VALLINAS VS. WAYNE DUFFOUR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 28, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANTS WAYNE DUFFOUR, CIRO MATARAZZO and LOREEN MCALLISTER's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. Defendant's Delta motion to Quash is DENIED, complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer upon expiration of the Notice served by first class and certified mail per CC 1946 with required relocation fees enclosed. Defendant does not cite any authority for the proposition that complaint must allege actual receipt of the certified mail and relocation payment in order to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Additionally, Plaintiff presents evidence that certified mail and relocation payments have been mailed, delivered, and received. Defendant's non-Delta motion is DENIED. Proof of Service, declaration of a registered process server, and certified mail receipts on file. = (501/RBU)
